params.name: Maya Mural
params.description:
On Jun 3, 800 BC, ancient Maya created this mural.
This mural was discovered at the ruins of a small Maya city-state in the Bonampak region. It is colorful and covers every wall of the three-chambered temple, depicting the ancient Maya tribes from conquest to victory and celebration in fine detail. The exceptional painting skills displayed in the image astound people's knowledge of ancient Maya painting.
